meaning: vt.(心灵学用语)心灵运输(物体、人)
examples: If I were an inventor, I want to invent a teleport.
In turn, the uncover map allows you to activate every teleport.
I've tried to teleport many times before, and it never worked, but this time it finally did.
"Maybe he can teleport over by the sparkle of his teeth, " said Ms. Tallichet.
For me, stealth revolved around blink, an ability that lets you teleport short distances silently.
